# Kevin Pike Ministries

Kevin Pike Ministries is a non-profit religious organization built to honor and uplift those who dedicate their lives to serving others — including military personnel, veterans, law enforcement, and first responders. Rooted in faith and service, the ministry's mission is captured in the powerful tagline 'Serving those who serve others.' The organization focuses on spiritual counseling, training, and community support, creating a safe and faith-driven space for heroes who often bear heavy burdens. The website will serve as a hub for donations, assistance requests, and an ongoing blog to share inspiration and resources.

Source: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app

---

# Serving those who serve others.


### Kevin Pike Ministries provides faith-rooted spiritual counseling, training, and support for military personnel, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families.


Request Assistance
Give Support





















## A ministry for those carrying heavy burdens.


Rooted in faith, honoring service — we walk alongside military personnel, veterans, law enforcement, and first responders.









"
Serving those who serve others
"



— Kevin Pike Ministries












### Faith-centered counseling


For difficult seasons — a safe, confidential space grounded in scripture and compassion.









### Training & resilience


Strengthening spiritual readiness through workshops, retreats, and one-on-one mentorship.









### Community support


For heroes and families — building connection, offering resources, and walking together in faith.














## How can we serve you today?










### Give Support


Help sustain counseling, training, and ministry care for those who serve.

Donate









### Request Assistance


Reach out for spiritual support, prayer, or guidance.

Get Help









### Read Resources


Explore devotionals, encouragement, and practical faith-based guidance.

Visit Blog

















## Faithful presence in moments that matter.


Service members, veterans, officers, medics, firefighters, dispatchers, and families often carry wounds that are invisible. Kevin Pike Ministries exists to meet them with compassion, prayer, and practical spiritual care.










### Spiritual counseling


Providing confidential, faith-based guidance for those carrying heavy burdens.











### Training and readiness


Equipping chaplains and leaders with the tools to serve effectively in high-stress environments.











### Ongoing community encouragement


Building a supportive network where heroes and their families find strength, hope, and belonging.






























## Stand with those who stand for us.


Whether you need care, want to give, or are looking for encouragement, this ministry was built to meet service-hearted people with faith, dignity, and support.




Request Assistance



Donate Today














Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

## Our Calling to Honor Heroes in Uniform — Kevin Pike Ministries

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/mission
Description: Discover how Kevin Pike Ministries answers the call as a veterans service organization, providing spiritual care and unwavering support for those who protect and serve. Learn our story.

Our Calling to Honor Heroes in Uniform — Kevin Pike Ministries




























Skip to main content















- Home
- Mission
- Support Services
- Donate
- Request Assistance
- Blog
- Contact



Contact









# Built on faith, service, and compassion.




Kevin Pike Ministries exists to honor and uplift those who dedicate their lives to serving others through spiritual counseling, training, and community support.










## Why This Ministry Exists


Kevin Pike Ministries was born out of a deep calling to serve the spiritual and emotional needs of those who stand on the front lines for our communities and country. Military personnel, veterans, law enforcement officers, and first responders carry unique burdens that few can fully understand. The weight of sacrifice, the scars of trauma, and the constant exposure to crisis create a profound need for faith-based support that addresses the whole person — heart, mind, and soul.


As a veterans service organization grounded in Christian faith, we provide a safe harbor where heroes can find spiritual counseling, peer connection, and practical training without judgment. Our approach recognizes that the same courage that drives them to protect others often makes it difficult to seek help for themselves. Through chaplaincy, confidential conversations, and community fellowship, we walk alongside these brave individuals and their families, offering hope and healing rooted in the gospel.




Serving those who serve others.

— Kevin Pike Ministries




















## The values guiding our work


Rooted in faith, committed to service — every value we hold is designed to honor those who protect and serve our communities.











### Faith-rooted care


We believe spiritual guidance is foundational to healing. Our chaplains and counselors integrate timeless biblical wisdom with compassionate listening, offering a safe harbor for those navigating trauma, stress, or moral injury. Every conversation is anchored in grace and truth.









### Honor for service


We recognize the profound sacrifices made by military personnel, veterans, law enforcement, and first responders. Our ministry exists to give back — providing tangible support, prayer, and community for those who have given so much. We treat every individual with the dignity their service deserves.









### Confidential compassion


Trust is non-negotiable. We create a private, judgment-free environment where first responders and service members can share openly. Whether you are struggling with PTSD, family challenges, or spiritual questions, your story is held in strict confidence and met with genuine empathy.









### Practical encouragement


Faith without action is incomplete. Beyond spiritual counsel, we connect individuals and families with practical resources — training programs, peer support networks, and community partnerships. Our goal is to equip you with tools that strengthen both your spirit and your daily life.









## Who We Serve








### Military Personnel


Active duty service members face unique spiritual and emotional challenges. We provide confidential pastoral counseling, faith-based resilience training, and a supportive community that understands the weight of the uniform. Our chaplaincy services are designed to strengthen the spirit of those who stand on the front lines of freedom.








### Veterans


Transitioning from military to civilian life can be one of the hardest battles a veteran faces. Kevin Pike Ministries walks alongside veterans through spiritual guidance, peer support groups, and connection to essential resources. We honor your sacrifice by ensuring you never have to navigate the journey home alone.








### Law Enforcement


Officers carry the heavy burden of protecting their communities daily. We offer a safe, confidential environment for law enforcement professionals to explore faith, receive moral injury counseling, and find restoration. Our ministry stands as a beacon of hope and healing for those who serve behind the badge.








### First Responders


Firefighters, paramedics, and emergency care workers witness trauma that leaves invisible scars. Our ministry provides spiritual first aid, crisis counseling, and a faith community that truly understands the cost of running toward danger. Here, you can find rest for your soul and renewal for your calling.















Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

## Faith-Fueled Support for Frontline Warriors — Kevin Pike Ministries

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/support-services
Description: Explore counseling, training, and community resources tailored for veterans and first responders. Kevin Pike Ministries delivers compassionate care inspired by federal law enforcement training centers.

Faith-Fueled Support for Frontline Warriors — Kevin Pike Ministries




























Skip to main content















- Home
- Mission
- Support Services
- Donate
- Request Assistance
- Blog
- Contact



Contact











# Spiritual care for those who serve.


The ministry offers pastoral support, faith-based guidance, training, prayer, and encouragement for service-hearted individuals and families. As a dedicated veterans service organization, we provide a safe, faith-driven space for military personnel, law enforcement, first responders, and their families who carry heavy burdens.


Request Assistance

















## Ministry Support Areas








### Spiritual Counseling


Prayerful, compassionate conversations for stress, grief, transition, and moral injury. Our chaplains walk alongside you, offering a safe and confidential space to explore faith, find peace, and rebuild inner strength.


One-on-one pastoral care sessions
Grief and trauma-informed spiritual support
Moral injury and reintegration guidance







### Training


Faith-based resilience, leadership, readiness, and care training designed for those who serve on the front lines. We equip individuals and teams with practical spiritual tools to thrive under pressure and lead with compassion.


Resilience and wellness workshops
Leadership development rooted in faith
Critical incident stress debriefing







### Community Support


Encouragement, referrals, prayer, and connection for service families. We believe no one should carry the weight alone, so we foster a network of care that extends beyond the individual to spouses, children, and loved ones.


Family support groups and prayer circles
Connection to veteran and first responder resources
Ongoing encouragement and pastoral check-ins









## What happens when you reach out



1


### Reach Out


Send a simple message describing your need. Whether you're a veteran, first responder, or family member seeking support, your first contact is confidential and met with compassion.




2


### Be Heard


Receive a compassionate response rooted in faith and respect. Our chaplaincy team listens without judgment, honoring your service and the burdens you carry.




3


### Walk Forward


Identify next steps for spiritual care, prayer, training, or community support. We walk alongside you toward healing and renewed purpose.












## A respectful place to begin.



- Your story will be received with dignity

- Care is rooted in Christian faith and compassion

- The ministry is built for those who carry responsibility for others


















Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

Fuel the Mission, Change a Hero's Life — Kevin Pike Ministries

Support the Mission

# Help carry the mission forward.


Your generosity helps provide spiritual counseling, training, and support for military personnel, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and families.

Give Support



















## Ways to Give


Your generosity fuels our mission of serving those who serve others. Every gift, no matter the size, provides spiritual care and practical support to military personnel, veterans, law enforcement, and first responders.











### One-Time Gift


Make an immediate impact with a single donation. Your one-time gift helps provide chaplaincy services, crisis counseling, and faith-based resources to those who protect and serve our communities.


Give Once











### Monthly Support


Become a sustaining partner through recurring monthly giving. Your consistent support ensures Kevin Pike Ministries can plan ahead, expand outreach, and be a steady beacon of hope for heroes and their families.


Give Monthly











### Sponsor Care Resources


Directly fund care packages, counseling sessions, or training materials for a veteran, first responder, or service family. Your sponsorship puts tangible resources into the hands of those who need them most.


Sponsor Now














## Giving with purpose.


Donations support ministry care, training materials, outreach, and community encouragement for those serving on the front lines.



As a veterans service organization rooted in faith, every gift is stewarded with integrity to ensure it directly impacts the lives of Military, Veterans, Law Enforcement, and First Responders and their families.












### Mission-focused care


Every resource is directed toward providing spiritual counseling, chaplaincy support, and practical care for those who protect our communities.










### Faithful resource use


We honor your trust by maintaining transparent, accountable stewardship that reflects our commitment to integrity and service.










### Support for heroes and families


We extend care beyond the individual, strengthening the families and support networks that stand beside our nation's heroes.

















## Your gift becomes care in action.



Stand with Kevin Pike Ministries as we serve those who serve others.

Donate Today















Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

## Get Faith-Based Help When You Need It — Kevin Pike Ministries

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/request-assistance
Description: Veterans, law enforcement, and first responders can request confidential spiritual support, counseling, or resources through Kevin Pike Ministries. You served us—now let us serve you.

Get Faith-Based Help When You Need It — Kevin Pike Ministries




























Skip to main content















- Home
- Mission
- Support Services
- Donate
- Request Assistance
- Blog
- Contact



Contact













# Request assistance.


If you are military, a veteran, law enforcement, a first responder, or a family member seeking spiritual support, you can begin with a simple message.


Get Support Now












## Tell us how we can help.


We are here for you. Please share only what you feel comfortable sharing. Your information is held in strict confidence as we walk alongside you on your journey.



Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Your Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy



Send Request













### Confidential & Compassionate Support


Kevin Pike Ministries exists to serve those who serve others. Whether you are active duty Military, a Veteran, a Law Enforcement officer, or a First Responder, we provide a safe, faith-driven space to find spiritual counseling and community support.




[business_email]



[business_phone]



[business_address]




View on Map











## What you can expect


When you reach out to Kevin Pike Ministries, you are met with dignity, faith, and a commitment to serve. Here is what the path forward looks like.








### A compassionate response


Every request is received with empathy and confidentiality. A trained ministry partner will listen to your story without judgment, ensuring you feel heard, valued, and understood from the very first conversation.







### Prayerful and respectful care


Your spiritual well-being is at the center of our mission. You can expect prayerful guidance rooted in scripture, offered with respect for your personal journey and the unique burdens carried by those who serve our nation and communities.







### Practical next steps when appropriate


Ministry doesn't stop at prayer. When your situation calls for tangible support, we help connect you with chaplaincy resources, veterans benefits administration contacts, or trusted community partners who can walk with you toward restoration.












## If this is urgent.



If you are in immediate danger or experiencing a crisis, contact local emergency services or an appropriate crisis resource right away. This ministry request form is for non-emergency spiritual care and support.




Call 911 Now


Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (988)



You are not alone. Help is available 24/7.















Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/blog

# Encouragement and resources.


Read devotionals, ministry updates, faith reflections, and practical encouragement for those who serve and those who love them.



























Featured Reflection


## Finding Strength After the Shift


A faith-centered reflection for first responders and service members learning to lay down the burdens of the day. Through spiritual counseling and community support, Kevin Pike Ministries walks alongside our heroes as they transition from the weight of the shift to the peace found in Christ.


Read Article












## Latest resources


Faith-driven encouragement and practical guidance for those who serve and their families.










### Prayer for those on duty


Lifting up our protectors in prayer. Explore guided prayers and scripture for military, law enforcement, and first responders actively serving.

Read more









### Supporting a veteran through transition


Practical steps for families and churches to walk alongside veterans returning to civilian life with dignity and understanding.

Read more









### Faith and resilience in law enforcement


How faith builds resilience on the front lines. Stories and strategies for officers facing daily trauma and stress.

Read more









### Encouragement for service families


The hidden heroes at home need support too. Devotionals and community resources for spouses and children of those who serve.

Read more









### When helpers need help


Recognizing burnout and moral injury in first responders. A faith-based guide to seeking help without shame.

Read more









### Building spiritual readiness


Training the soul for the battles ahead. Practical disciplines for military and first responders to cultivate inner strength.

Read more

















## Need encouragement beyond an article?



If you are carrying more than you can say out loud, Kevin Pike Ministries is here to listen, pray, and walk with you. Our chaplaincy and support network exists for veterans, law enforcement, military members, and first responders who need a safe, faith-driven space to find strength.


Request Assistance













Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy





























- Home
- Mission
- Support Services
- Donate
- Request Assistance
- Blog
- Contact



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/11/2026



Kevin Pike Ministries ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Kevin Pike Ministries

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement





























- Home
- Mission
- Support Services
- Donate
- Request Assistance
- Blog
- Contact



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 11, 2026



Kevin Pike Ministries is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Kevin Pike Ministries

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Serving those who serve — military, veterans, law enforcement, first responders, and their families — with faith, hope, and practical support.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://kevin-pike-ministries-acc3dfb8.zappy5.app/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions





























- Home
- Mission
- Support Services
- Donate
- Request Assistance
- Blog
- Contact



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 11, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Kevin Pike Ministries

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Non-Profit Religious Organization provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Kevin Pike Ministries provides Non-Profit Religious Organization through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Kevin Pike Ministries. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Kevin Pike Ministries
